message:
chore(fcp-core): regenerate CBOR test vectors after key rotation

Refresh enrollment and simulation request CBOR vectors with updated
cryptographic key material. Binary content is deterministic from the
current key fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
